title: Onboarding - Screens in dark mode
scenario: Onboarding screens do not render correctly in dark mode when phone is set to dark mode
steps: 1. Set the phone's system theme to Dark Mode (Settings → Display → Dark Mode).
2. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. If not already on the onboarding flow, log out or clear app data to trigger the onboarding screens.
4. Observe each onboarding screen as they appear (Welcome, Permissions, Device Pairing, etc.).
5. For each screen, verify that all UI elements (text, buttons, icons, illustrations) are rendered correctly.
6. Check that background colors, text colors, and accent colors match the Figma dark mode specification.
7. Verify that all images and illustrations have proper contrast and are not washed out or distorted in dark mode.
expected: All onboarding screens display correctly in dark mode. All elements, images, and colors match the Figma specification with proper contrast and legibility.
